creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
No I didn't notice anything peculiar in the logs, nor is my system behaving unusual.  In the meantime I will keep looking for a solution to my problem.  In the worst case I will just end up installing from the repo using pkgng if necessary.

For what it's worth here is my dmesg output:
